# Danfoss — TCS Piping Infrastructure for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-30

## Company Overview
- **HQ:** Nordborg, Denmark
- Danish industrial conglomerate — drives, valves, heat exchangers, refrigeration
- Data center thermal segment growing rapidly with AI factory buildout
- US presence: offices in Baltimore MD + regional distributor network

---

## CoolTrain — Pre-Engineered TCS Valve Train (KEY PRODUCT)
- **Announced:** March 2026 (GTC 2026 release timing)
- **What it is:** Pre-fabricated, pre-tested Technology Cooling System (TCS) valve train
  - The "plumbing backbone" between CDUs and server racks, delivered as a ready-to-install assembly
- **Problem it solves:** Eliminates field fabrication of TCS piping
  - Traditional approach: custom pipe fabrication on-site, welding/soldering, weeks of labor
  - CoolTrain approach: pre-assembled modular sections, bolt-together on-site, days not weeks
- **Key components included:**
  - Isolation valves
  - Balancing valves (automatic flow balancing per rack)
  - Pressure/temperature sensors
  - Y-strainers
  - Flexible connections
  - Check valves
  - All pre-wired for BMS integration
- **Compatible with:** CoolIT stainless steel TCS OR Aquatherm polypropylene TCS piping
- **Commissioning:** Pressure-tested and flow-verified at factory before ship
- **Status:** Shipping 2026

---

## Other Danfoss Data Center Products

### Drives (Variable Speed Pumps)
- FC-102 Aqua frequency converters for pump speed control
- Integrates with CDU pump variable speed control
- Used by CoolIT and other CDU manufacturers internally

### Micro Channel Heat Exchangers
- Compact aluminum heat exchangers
- Used in air-side economizers + dry coolers
- Relevant for ADC heat rejection equipment

### Valves
- Ball valves, globe valves, butterfly valves for cooling loops
- Hansen brand quick-disconnect couplings (OCP-compatible, competes with Staubli)
- Thermostatic mixing valves for supply temp regulation

---

## ADC Stack Position
- CoolTrain = **TCS layer** (CDU supply/return headers to rack manifold connections)
- Complements CoolIT TCS design + install services
- CoolTrain = faster deployment, lower labor cost, consistent commissioning
- Danfoss also inside CDU pump drives — invisible but present in most DLC systems
